summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. entered into a $3.2 billion revolving credit agreement.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. executed a new $3.2 billion revolving credit agreement with various financial institutions, including JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, and others.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. entered into a $3,200,000,000 revolving credit agreement.

extraction_notes: Numbers are in millions of USD; filing did not disclose company name or report date.
